itinerary_short.title: Delhi / Chandigarh - Shimla - Kufri - Narkanda
itinerary_short.desc: Arrive Shimla, drive to Narkanda via Kufri. Overnight in Narkanda.

itinerary_short.title: Narkanda - Hatu Peak - Rampur - Sarahan - Sangla
itinerary_short.desc: Visit Hatu Peak & Bhimakali Temple at Sarahan. Descend to Sangla Valley. Overnight in Sangla.

itinerary_short.title: Sangla - Kamru Fort - Rakcham - Chitkul - Sangla
itinerary_short.desc: Explore Kamru Fort and drive to Chitkul, the last village of India. Return to Sangla.

itinerary_more.title: Sangla - Reckong Peo - Kalpa - Roghi Village - Suicide Point
itinerary_more.desc: Drive to Kalpa with stunning Kinner Kailash views. Visit Roghi Village and Suicide Point. Overnight in Kalpa.

itinerary_more.title: Kalpa - Khab Bridge - Nako Lake - Gue Monastery - Tabo Monastery
itinerary_more.desc: Confluence of Sutlej & Spiti at Khab Bridge. Visit serene Nako Lake and the famous Gue Mummy Monastery. Overnight in Tabo.

itinerary_more.title: Tabo - Dhankar Monastery - Dhankar Village - Kaza
itinerary_more.desc: Marvel at the clifftop Dhankar Monastery & turquoise lake. Arrive Kaza, the district headquarters of Spiti. Overnight in Kaza.

itinerary_more.title: Kaza - Langza - Komic - Hikkim - Kaza
itinerary_more.desc: Visit Langza (Giant Buddha & fossils), Komic (world's highest motorable village), and Hikkim (world's highest post office). Overnight in Kaza.

itinerary_more.title: Kaza - Key Monastery - Kibber - Chicham Bridge - Losar - Kunzum Pass - Chandratal
itinerary_more.desc: Key Monastery perched on a cliff, Kibber village, Asia's highest suspension bridge at Chicham. Cross Kunzum Pass (4,550m) to Chandratal Lake. Overnight at Chandratal camp.

itinerary_more.title: Chandratal - Batal - Chhatru - Gramphu - Koksar - Atal Tunnel - Manali
itinerary_more.desc: Drive through dramatic lunar landscape. Pass through Atal Tunnel back to Manali. Overnight in Manali.

itinerary_more.title: Manali - Kullu - Mandi - Chandigarh / Delhi
itinerary_more.desc: Scenic drive back to Chandigarh or Delhi. Tour ends.

itinerary_short.title: Delhi / Chandigarh - Shimla - Kufri - Narkanda
itinerary_short.desc: Arrive Shimla, drive to Narkanda via Kufri. Overnight in Narkanda.

itinerary_short.title: Narkanda - Hatu Peak - Rampur - Sarahan - Sangla
itinerary_short.desc: Hatu Peak & Bhimakali Temple. Descend to Sangla. Overnight in Sangla.

itinerary_short.title: Sangla - Kamru Fort - Rakcham - Chitkul - Sangla
itinerary_short.desc: Chitkul last village of India. Return to Sangla.

itinerary_more.title: Sangla - Reckong Peo - Kalpa - Roghi Village - Suicide Point
itinerary_more.desc: Kinner Kailash views from Kalpa. Roghi Village and Suicide Point. Overnight in Kalpa.

itinerary_more.title: Kalpa - Khab Bridge - Nako Lake - Gue Monastery - Tabo Monastery
itinerary_more.desc: Khab Bridge confluence, Nako Lake & Gue Mummy Monastery. Overnight in Tabo.

itinerary_more.title: Tabo - Dhankar Monastery - Dhankar Village - Kaza
itinerary_more.desc: Clifftop Dhankar Monastery & Spiti River confluence. Arrive Kaza. Overnight in Kaza.

itinerary_more.title: Kaza - Langza - Komic - Hikkim - Kaza
itinerary_more.desc: Giant Buddha at Langza, world's highest motorable village at Komic, world's highest post office at Hikkim. Overnight in Kaza.

itinerary_more.title: Kaza - Key Monastery - Kibber - Chicham Bridge - Kunzum Pass - Chandratal - Manali
itinerary_more.desc: Key Monastery, Kibber, Chicham Bridge, cross Kunzum Pass (4,550m). Chandratal Lake, then drive to Manali via Atal Tunnel.

itinerary_more.title: Manali - Kullu - Mandi - Chandigarh / Delhi
itinerary_more.desc: Scenic return drive. Tour ends.

itinerary_short.title: Delhi / Chandigarh - Shimla - Kufri - Narkanda
itinerary_short.desc: Arrive Shimla, drive to Narkanda via Kufri. Overnight in Narkanda.

itinerary_short.title: Narkanda - Hatu Peak - Rampur - Sarahan - Sangla
itinerary_short.desc: Hatu Peak & Bhimakali Temple. Descend to Sangla. Overnight in Sangla.

itinerary_short.title: Sangla - Kamru Fort - Rakcham - Chitkul - Reckong Peo - Kalpa
itinerary_short.desc: Chitkul last village, then drive to Kalpa with Kinner Kailash views. Overnight in Kalpa.

itinerary_more.title: Kalpa - Roghi Village - Khab Bridge - Nako Lake - Gue Monastery - Tabo Monastery
itinerary_more.desc: Khab confluence, Nako Lake, Gue Mummy. Overnight in Tabo.

itinerary_more.title: Tabo - Dhankar Monastery - Dhankar Village - Kaza
itinerary_more.desc: Ancient Tabo Monastery (1,000+ years old). Clifftop Dhankar. Arrive Kaza. Overnight in Kaza.

itinerary_more.title: Kaza - Langza - Komic - Hikkim - Kaza
itinerary_more.desc: Langza, Komic, Hikkim - Spiti's iconic high-altitude villages. Overnight in Kaza.

itinerary_more.title: Kaza - Key Monastery - Kibber - Chicham Bridge - Kunzum Pass - Chandratal - Manali
itinerary_more.desc: Full-day drive from Kaza across Kunzum Pass (4,550m) via Chandratal to Manali through Atal Tunnel.

itinerary_more.title: Manali - Kullu - Mandi - Chandigarh / Delhi
itinerary_more.desc: Return drive. Tour ends.

title: Spiti Valley Circuit - 7 Days / 6 Nights from Chandigarh

itinerary_short.title: Chandigarh / Shimla - Kufri - Narkanda - Rampur - Sarahan - Sangla
itinerary_short.desc: Covering Kufri, Narkanda, Bhimakali Temple at Sarahan, then down to Sangla Valley. Overnight in Sangla.

itinerary_short.title: Sangla - Kamru Fort - Rakcham - Chitkul - Reckong Peo - Kalpa
itinerary_short.desc: Morning Chitkul visit, afternoon drive to Kalpa. Kinner Kailash panorama at sunset. Overnight in Kalpa.

itinerary_short.title: Kalpa - Khab Bridge - Nako Lake - Gue Monastery - Tabo Monastery
itinerary_short.desc: Khab confluence, Nako Lake, Gue Mummy. Overnight in Tabo.

itinerary_more.title: Tabo - Dhankar Monastery - Dhankar Village - Kaza
itinerary_more.desc: Ancient Tabo Monastery (1,000+ years old). Clifftop Dhankar. Arrive Kaza. Overnight in Kaza.

itinerary_more.title: Kaza - Langza - Komic - Hikkim - Kaza
itinerary_more.desc: Langza fossil village, Komic (world's highest motorable village), Hikkim post office. Overnight in Kaza.

itinerary_more.title: Kaza - Key Monastery - Kibber - Chicham Bridge - Kunzum Pass - Chandratal - Manali
itinerary_more.desc: Key Monastery, Kibber, Chicham Bridge, Kunzum Pass (4,550m), Chandratal Lake, Atal Tunnel - epic final high-altitude day.

itinerary_more.title: Manali - Kullu - Mandi - Chandigarh / Delhi
itinerary_more.desc: Return drive to Chandigarh or Delhi. Tour ends.

title: Spiti Valley - Kinnaur Loop (Return via Kinnaur)

itinerary_short.title: Shimla - Kufri - Narkanda - Rampur - Sangla
itinerary_short.desc: Drive from Shimla through Kufri, Narkanda to Sangla Valley. Overnight in Sangla.

itinerary_short.title: Sangla - Chitkul - Khab Bridge - Nako
itinerary_short.desc: Visit Chitkul (last Indian village), cross into Spiti at Khab Bridge. Overnight at Nako Lake.

itinerary_short.title: Nako - Gue Monastery - Tabo Monastery - Dhankar - Kaza
itinerary_short.desc: Gue Mummy, ancient Tabo Monastery, clifftop Dhankar. Arrive Kaza. Overnight in Kaza.

itinerary_more.title: Kaza - Langza - Komic - Hikkim - Key Monastery - Kibber - Chicham Bridge - Kaza
itinerary_more.desc: Full Spiti valley day covering all iconic high-altitude villages and monasteries. Overnight in Kaza.

itinerary_more.title: Kaza - Tabo - Nako - Khab Bridge - Kalpa
itinerary_more.desc: Return via same Kinnaur route, arriving Kalpa with Kinner Kailash evening views. Overnight in Kalpa.

itinerary_more.title: Kalpa - Reckong Peo - Sangla - Sarahan - Narkanda / Shimla
itinerary_more.desc: Sangla Valley once more. Bhimakali Temple at Sarahan. Drive to Narkanda or Shimla. Overnight.

itinerary_more.title: Narkanda / Shimla - Chandigarh
itinerary_more.desc: Morning drive back to Chandigarh. Tour ends.

title: Manali - Spiti - Kinnaur Circuit - 10 Days / 9 Nights

itinerary_short.title: Chandigarh - Mandi - Kullu - Manali
itinerary_short.desc: Scenic drive to Manali through Kullu Valley. Overnight in Manali.

itinerary_short.title: Manali - Atal Tunnel - Koksar - Chhatru - Batal - Chandratal
itinerary_short.desc: Drive through Atal Tunnel into Lahaul, across the moonscape to Chandratal Lake. Overnight at Chandratal camp.

itinerary_short.title: Chandratal - Kunzum Pass - Losar - Key Monastery - Kibber - Chicham Bridge - Kaza
itinerary_short.desc: Cross Kunzum Pass (4,550m), visit Key Monastery, Kibber, Chicham Bridge. Arrive Kaza. Overnight in Kaza.

itinerary_more.title: Kaza - Langza - Komic - Hikkim - Kaza
itinerary_more.desc: Langza fossil village, Komic highest village, Hikkim post office. Overnight in Kaza.

itinerary_more.title: Kaza - Dhankar Monastery - Tabo Monastery
itinerary_more.desc: Clifftop Dhankar fortress monastery. Ancient Tabo Monastery (est. 996 AD). Overnight in Tabo.

itinerary_more.title: Tabo - Gue Monastery - Nako - Khab Bridge - Kalpa
itinerary_more.desc: Gue Mummy monastery, Nako Lake, Khab confluence. Drive to Kalpa with Kinner Kailash views. Overnight in Kalpa.

itinerary_more.title: Kalpa - Reckong Peo - Sangla Valley
itinerary_more.desc: Reckong Peo formalities, descend into lush Sangla Valley. Overnight in Sangla.

itinerary_more.title: Sangla - Rakcham - Chitkul - Sangla
itinerary_more.desc: Explore Chitkul, India's last inhabited village on the Indo-Tibet border. Return to Sangla. Overnight in Sangla.

itinerary_more.title: Sangla - Sarahan - Rampur - Narkanda - Shimla
itinerary_more.desc: Bhimakali Temple at Sarahan. Drive through apple orchards to Shimla. Overnight in Shimla.

itinerary_more.title: Shimla - Chandigarh / Delhi
itinerary_more.desc: Morning leisure in Shimla. Drive back to Chandigarh or Delhi. Tour ends.
